✅ VERIFIED P&L — the FREE SKRUSDT short, closed in the green 📸

🔻 SKRUSDT — SHORT (Bitunix · 15m) · 20x
+79.82% · held ~2h
ID: SKR-S-20260627
Entry 0.008692 → avg close 0.008341

Straight off the exchange, no edits. The triangle broke down on cue — a ≈4% spot move on the short, 20x sizing → the figure above.

It worked the boring way: SL set at 0.00895 BEFORE entry. Risk first, target second — not a lucky call, a planned one.

⚠️ One idea that played out — not every setup does. 15m is fast: small size, trail your stop, manage your own risk.
